creator: sebastien.boggia@unistra.fr
text:
Created attachment 169953
core.txt file

We recently deployed a new PF firewall for our Wi-Fi users.

There is 2 access networks for up to 8000 simultaneous Wi-Fi users.
We configured round-robin NAT on 2 /25 public address spaces.

Since the firewall installation, kernel panics occurred.
Please, find attached the generated core.txt file and the core file at this URL : 
https://seafile.unistra.fr/f/2b12056b21/?raw=1

The problem seems to have relation with PF and NAT translation.
